description_long: This object is a highly detailed human male soccer player wearing an Argentina national team uniform. The player is dressed in a light blue and white striped jersey with a collar, black shorts with white stripes, and black knee-high socks featuring white branding. He has short dark hair and a trimmed beard, and his arms are extended horizontally in a T-pose. The shoes are bright yellow with blue accents and black soles, resembling modern soccer cleats. The overall appearance is realistic, with attention to facial features, clothing textures, and athletic proportions.
description: A realistic male soccer player in an Argentina uniform, standing in a T-pose with detailed facial features and athletic attire.
description_view_0: Front view showing the player's face, Argentina jersey, and full uniform details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the player's profile, arm extension, and shoe design.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the jersey, shorts, and hairstyle.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the player's profile and uniform from the opposite side.
attribute_tail_design: Not applicable; no tail structure present.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Not applicable; no landing gear present.
